definition:
μαντεύομαι
 (μαντίς, a seer, diviner), [in LXX for קָסַם, Deu.18:10, al. ;] 
to divine, practise divination: Act.16:16.†
 SYN.: προφητεύω, which see, in distinction from which μ. is used in LXX and NT only of false prophets and those who practise the heathen arts of divination and soothsaying (cf. 1Ki.28:8, and see Tr., Syn., § vi)  (AS)
